warps.notes: Left exit door back to Cianwood City
Right exit door back to Cianwood City

tile_layout.notes: Layout is 10 tiles wide x 18 tiles tall. Chuck (gym leader) stands at top-center on a raised platform (tiles 4,1). Four Black Belt trainers guard the path. Three Strength boulders (at y=7, plus one at y=1 beside Chuck) form a puzzle: player must push the y=7 boulders aside to clear a path to Chuck. Chuck kicks boulder at y=1 into the air during his intro. Two gym statues flank the entrance at y=15.

gym_info.badge_effect: Pokemon up to Lv70 obey (including traded). Enables use of HM02 Fly outside battle.
gym_info.tm_description: DynamicPunch — Fighting-type, 100 base power, 50% accuracy, always confuses on hit.
gym_info.puzzle_description: Three Strength boulders block the path to Chuck at tile row y=7 (object coords 3,7 / 4,7 / 5,7). Player must have HM04 Strength to push them aside. Chuck also has a boulder beside him (5,1) which he punches away dramatically during his intro before battle begins.

npcs.name: Chuck
npcs.dialogue_summary: WAHAHAH! Dramatic intro where he punches a boulder away. Then challenges player. After defeat, gives Storm Badge and TM01 DynamicPunch. Post-battle dialogue about training 24 hours a day.

team.notes: Trainertype MOVES — Mind Reader + DynamicPunch combo for guaranteed hit. Surf provides coverage.

trainers.name: Yoshi
trainers.dialogue_seen: My Pokemon and I are bound together by friendship. Our bond will never be broken!
trainers.dialogue_after: You seem to have a strong bond with your Pokemon too!

trainers.name: Lao

team.notes: TRAINERTYPE_MOVES — elemental punches provide wide coverage

trainers.dialogue_after: Fighting Pokemon are afraid of psychics...

trainers.name: Nob
trainers.dialogue_seen: Words are useless. Let your fists do the talking!

trainers.name: Lung
trainers.dialogue_seen: My raging fists will shatter your Pokemon!
trainers.dialogue_after: My Pokemon lost... My... my pride is shattered...

bg_events.notes: Left statue — displays gym info before Chuck beaten, Chuck's name after

boulders.notes: Chuck punches this boulder during intro (movement: big_step LEFT, big_step UP, fast_jump_step RIGHT). Disappears after intro script.
Puzzle boulder blocking path to Chuck. Push with HM04 Strength.
Puzzle boulder blocking path to Chuck.
Puzzle boulder blocking path to Chuck.

events.description: Chuck delivers his WAHAHAH! speech, turns to face right, then punches the boulder beside him (boulder_chuck_intro slides left then up then right, disappears). Chuck then faces player and delivers second speech before battle begins.

Sets EVENT_BEAT_CHUCK. Awards Storm Badge (SFX_GET_BADGE, sets ENGINE_STORMBADGE flag). Checks badge count: if 6 badges, activates Goldenrod Rockets event; if 7, activates Radio Tower Rockets event. Then gives TM01 DynamicPunch.
Chuck gives TM01 DynamicPunch if not already received. After that he talks about training 24 hours a day.

notes: Cianwood Gym is a Fighting-type gym. The main puzzle involves three Strength boulders blocking the central corridor leading to Chuck. Players need HM04 Strength (obtainable from a Gentleman on Route 42 or from the Ruins of Alph area) to push the boulders. Chuck performs one of the most memorable intro animations in the game — throwing a boulder before the fight. His Poliwrath's Mind Reader + DynamicPunch combo is a signature threat. The Storm Badge is the 5th Johto badge. Defeating Chuck also eventually triggers Team Rocket events in Goldenrod City depending on how many badges the player has.
